'''âw-sh-dh-d''' ('''kawashdhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exply|exply]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exply|exply]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-sh-dh-d
|-
! Lemma
| kawashdhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwashdhedoko|thiwashdhedoko]] || [[word:jiwashdhedoko|jiwashdhedoko]] || [[word:shiwashdhedoko|shiwashdhedoko]] || [[word:kiwashdhedoko|kiwashdhedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwashdhedoko|thuthuwashdhedoko]] || [[word:jujuwashdhedoko|jujuwashdhedoko]] || [[word:shushuwashdhedoko|shushuwashdhedoko]] || [[word:kukuwashdhedoko|kukuwashdhedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
